full_text:
Shan Gu (Gongxia) 單固 (恭夏)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shan Gu (單固), styledGongxia (恭夏), was born in Shanyang. A man of character, reluctantly served Linghu Yu but, despite heavy torture, refused to betray him. Shan Gu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
